results.title: Starliner arrives safely back on Earth
results.summary: Boeing’s Starliner landed safely at 12:01 a.m. Eastern time on Saturday, Sept. 7. After an extended stay at the ISS, Starliner’s reusable crew module touched down at White Sands Space Harbor.

results.title: ISS Daily Summary Report – 7/26/2024
results.summary: The CFT crew continued assisting the ISS crew with various audits and housekeeping. They also performed CloudNet Testing and STEMonstration Earth Science activities.
